title: SPEEDWOX 100pc 1 Inches Sanding Discs Hook and Loop Sandpaper 120 Grit Sander Disc Sanding for Drill Grinder Rotary Tools No Hole
features: 【SPECIFICATIONS】 Sanding discs 1 inch 120 grit 100 pcs per box.The yellow sanding pad is an applicable object, not sold as a set
【MATERIAL】 Premium aluminium oxide abrasive for sanding pad features good abrasion resistance.
【HOOK and LOOP BACKING】 Makes grit removal & replacement quick and easy, and well fitting in sander during woodworking.
【WIDELY APPLICATIONS】 Good choice for wood, leather, stones, glass, drill grinder rotary tools.
【CAUTION】Please confirm the size before buying. Please inspect before every use. Do not use if damaged.
description: Product Description 1-Inch Sanding Discs Set No Hole 100 Pieces Function of Different Grits ·40-240 Grit: Coarse finishing, suitable for polishing metal, wood and other hard or rough objects. ·240-600 Grit: Fine finishing, suitable for light sanding. ·600-2000 Grit: Well finishing, suitable for fine polishing or buffing mahogany furniture, bodhi seeds, jade and so on. Hook and Loop Backing ·Strong adhesion, not easy to fall off, more convenient to use. Premium Quality ·Stable aluminum oxide grain and latex base paper for long term use, anti-static and resist moisture. Widely Application ·Widely used in automobile, woodworking, marine, industrial，handicrafts, etc. How to Use About SPEEDWOX ·Over 60 years of OEM manufacturing experience, speedwox can provide stable high quality products. ·We devote ourselves to make SPEEDWOX as a well-known hand tools brand, to provide customer more high quality and practical hand tools for a long term. Attention ·Keep out of children's reach. ·Please check the grits and sizes before purchasing. ·Please do not soak in water.
